title: Project-control hardening follow-up (owner-scoped: orchestrator roster prohibition, gate-enum validation, M0-T007/T008 roster preconditions)
objective: Scoped follow-up to M0-T014 per owner directive 2026-07-17: (1) prohibit the reserved orchestrator identity from reviewer_agents - reject it at new-task authoring and in the independent-gate branch of gate(); the orchestrator may author an explicitly classified G2/self_check record but can never satisfy an independent-review gate (closes M0-T014 G5 defect D1); (2) validate --gates values against the canonical gate enum G0-G7 and reject unknown names immediately with a bounded explanatory error (closes D2); (3) before M0-T007 or M0-T008 can leave blocked status, their packets must be amended with valid producer and independent-reviewer rosters - this task documents and enforces that precondition; their blocked status is NOT altered and they are NOT dispatched now (closes M0-T014 G3 OBS-3). D3/D4 and remaining OBS items stay in the documented maintenance backlog (not correctness/security-affecting)
business_reason: Owner directive 2026-07-17 post-M0-T014-acceptance: scoped hardening without delaying the active gate cycle
inputs: M0-T014 G5 report project-control/reports/M0-T014-G5-security-review.md defects D1/D2 (verbatim remediations) and G3 report M0-T014-G3-code-review.md OBS-3
Owner directive 2026-07-17 (verbatim scope; D3/D4/OBS remain maintenance backlog)
tools/project_control.py + tools/test_project_control.py as merged at main 255ebb6
outputs: gate(): independent-gate branch rejects --reviewer orchestrator; new_task(): rejects orchestrator in --reviewers; bounded errors
new_task(): --gates entries validated against the canonical G0-G7 enum, unknown names rejected immediately with a bounded explanatory error

Documented + tested precondition: a blocked task with empty/invalid reviewer_agents (M0-T007/M0-T008) cannot transition out of blocked until the orchestrator amends producer/reviewer rosters; no status change to those tasks in this task
Negative tests for each new rejection; existing suite stays green
forbidden_paths: project-control ledger data (tasks/gates/checkpoints/blockers/state) - especially M0-T007.json/M0-T008.json status
acceptance_scenarios: S1: new-task with orchestrator in --reviewers rejected; gate G1/G3/G4/G5/G6 with --reviewer orchestrator rejected even if rostered (legacy ledger unaffected - validate on write)
S2: new-task --gates G9,bogus rejected immediately with a bounded error naming the offending entry and the canonical enum; valid G0-G7 combinations accepted

S3: blocked task with empty reviewer_agents cannot progress out of blocked (bounded error directing packet amendment); after roster amendment the unblock path works; M0-T007/T008 untouched in the live ledger
S4: full existing suite + CI control-plane job green; no retro-rejection of stored history
